main.summary: Adapts CliWrap Command events to a ConsoleCommandObserver.
main.remarks: Implements IObserver{CommandEvent} and coordinates completion for observed Commands.

field.name: observer
field.summary: Observer that handles streamed Command events.

field.name: source
field.summary: TaskCompletionSource used to signal CommandResult completion.

property.name: Completion
property.summary: Task that completes when the observed Command finishes.
